zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beaupel於1323年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Ralph Beaupel24歲，母親Elizabeth Bloyou23歲。她與Nigel Loring在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年3月在英國貝德福爾哈爾格拉福享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Beaupel于1323年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Ralph Beaupel24岁，母亲Elizabeth Bloyou23岁。她与Nigel Loring在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年3月在英国貝德福爾哈爾格拉福享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beaupel was born in 1323, in Devon, England, her father, Ralph Beaupel, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Bloyou, was 23. She married Nigel Loring in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in March 1386, in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beaupel est née en 1323, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Beaupel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bloyou, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Nigel Loring à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en mars 1386, à Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Beaupel 1323 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Beaupel 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bloyou 23. Sie hat in Devon, England, United Kingdom Nigel Loring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im März 1386 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beaupel è nata il nel 1323 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Ralph Beaupel, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bloyou, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Nigel Loring nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel marzo 1386, nel Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaupel(이)가 1323년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Beaupel(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bloyou(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Nigel Loring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 3월 영국 베드퍼드실르 차그레이브에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beaupel nasceu em 1323, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Beaupel, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bloyou, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Nigel Loring em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em março de 1386, em Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beaupel родилась в 1323 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Beaupel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bloyou, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nigel Loring в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла марта 1386 г. в местности халграв, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Beaupel nació en 1323, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Beaupel, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bloyou, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nigel Loring en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en marzo de 1386, en Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
